name: gis-to-db
description: Ingest GIS and CAD files (Shapefile, ESRI File Geodatabase, DWG, DXF) into PostGIS, MongoDB, or MySQL spatial. Scaffold full FastAPI services, generate one-shot CLIs, convert inline, or add a GIS-import feature to an existing app (NestJS / FastAPI / Django / Angular / React / Next.js / Vue).
